---
title: ""
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
.research-page {
  --research-accent: #426b73;
  --research-accent-soft: #e7f0f1;
  --research-ink: #1f2933;
  --research-muted: #5f6f7a;
  --research-line: #d7e1e4;
  --research-bg: #ffffff;
}

.research-intro,
.research-section {
  max-width: 1120px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 3.5rem 1.5rem;
}

.research-intro {
  padding-top: 2rem;
  padding-bottom: 2.5rem;
}

.research-kicker {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: var(--research-accent);
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
}

.research-intro h2 {
  font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 5vw, 4rem);
  line-height: 1;
  margin: 0 0 1.2rem;
  color: var(--research-ink);
}

.research-lede {
  max-width: 900px;
  font-size: 1.12rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
  color: var(--research-ink);
}

.research-muted {
  color: var(--research-muted);
}

.research-band {
  background: #f7fafb;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--research-line);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--research-line);
}

.research-section-title {
  font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.3rem);
  margin: 0 0 1.2rem;
  color: var(--research-ink);
}

.research-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 1.2rem;
}

.research-card {
  background: var(--research-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--research-line);
  border-radius: 18px;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(31, 41, 51, 0.05);
  height: 100%;
}

.research-card img {
  width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: 16 / 10;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
  background: var(--research-accent-soft);
}

.research-card-body {
  padding: 1.2rem;
}

.research-card h3 {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  margin: 0 0 0.55rem;
  color: var(--research-ink);
}

.research-card p {
  margin: 0 0 0.9rem;
  color: var(--research-muted);
  line-height: 1.55;
}

.research-card a {
  font-weight: 650;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--research-accent);
}

@media (max-width: 820px) {
  .research-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="research-page">

<section class="research-intro">
  <div class="research-kicker">Complexity · Information · Topology</div>
  <h2>Research</h2>
  <div class="research-lede">
    <p>
      My research investigates how global patterns, behaviours, and meanings emerge from local interactions in complex systems. Beginning with my PhD work on geometry-driven hyperuniformity, I became interested in how simple generative rules can produce striking forms of collective order.
    </p>
    <p>
      My current work extends this perspective to information systems, especially those mediated by generative AI, where feedback, adaptation, and communication shape how knowledge circulates and evolves.
    </p>
    <p class="research-muted">
      Across these domains, topology provides a unifying lens: a way to identify structural signatures in high-dimensional systems and to develop diagnostics for robustness, information flow, and knowledge integrity.
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="research-band">
  <div class="research-section">
    <h2 class="research-section-title">Research themes</h2>
    <div class="research-grid">
      <article class="research-card">
        <img src="images/research-geometry-placeholder.jpg" alt="Placeholder image for geometry-driven complexity">
        <div class="research-card-body">
          <h3>Geometry-driven complexity</h3>
          <p>How local geometric interactions and constraints can generate large-scale order, pattern formation, and hyperuniform structure.</p>
          <a href="research/hyperuniformity.html">Read more →</a>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="research-card">
        <img src="images/research-human-ai-placeholder.jpg" alt="Placeholder image for information dynamics in human-AI systems">
        <div class="research-card-body">
          <h3>Information dynamics in human–AI systems</h3>
          <p>How information circulates, adapts, and changes through feedback between people, organisations, and generative AI systems.</p>
          <a href="research/information-dynamics.html">Read more →</a>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="research-card">
        <img src="images/research-knowledge-integrity-placeholder.jpg" alt="Placeholder image for knowledge integrity and structural diagnostics">
        <div class="research-card-body">
          <h3>Knowledge integrity & structural diagnostics</h3>
          <p>Topological and structural methods for diagnosing coherence, robustness, distortion, and integrity in knowledge systems.</p>
          <a href="research/knowledge-integrity.html">Read more →</a>
        </div>
      </article>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

</div>
```
